text: 馃摎 IELTS Vocabulary 鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣 Bugun o'rganadigan so'zimiz: Ubiquitous /ju藧藞b瑟kw瑟t蓹s/ Adjective 馃嚭馃嚳 Ma'nosi: Hamma joyda mavjud bo'lgan, keng tarqalgan. 馃挰 Misol: "Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society." 馃挕 Kichik maslahat: Essay yozayotganda "common" yoki "everywhere" degan so'zlar juda ko'p takrorlanadi. Ularning o'rniga "ubiquitous" ishlatsangiz, Lexical Resource ballingiz ancha ko'tariladi!

馃摎 IELTS Vocabulary 鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣鈹佲攣 Bugun o'rganadigan so'zimiz: Mitigate /藞m瑟t瑟伞e瑟t/ Verb 馃嚭馃嚳 Ma'nosi: Yumshatmoq, yengillashtirmoq, kamaytirmoq (muammo yoki qiyinchilikni). 馃挰 Misol: "The government must take action to mitigate the effects of climate change." 馃挕 Kichik maslahat: Task 2 'Problem and Solution' essaylarida yechim yozayotganda "solve" o'rniga "mitigate the problem" (muammoni yumshatish) deb yozish ancha akademik va tabiiyroq eshitiladi.
